center.name: St Arnaud, Victoria
center.summary: St Arnaud, Victoria是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝脸吸蜜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also found in the Grampians region, particularly in the vicinity of Stawell, Ararat and St Arnaud, with rare reports from southwestern Victoria

links.label: 分布于
